dj_text: Fart meme edition! That Pirate Bot DJ Radio! YES! Danskrap dk   Så Ka I Lære Det 2003! And we keep going with Niarn ft. Bai-D - hvis i kunne se mig nu!
commercial_text: Brought to you by Sudo Sweat — the deodorant for when you need root access to your armpits.
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
